kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : psycopg2.connect(database='postgres', user='postgres', password=***, host='localhost', port=5432)
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

test.name: TC-5.1: Verify 90-Day Data Retention

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '55', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin@example.com", "password": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
INSERT INTO "SystemLog" ("action", "logType", "method", "endpoint", "ipAddress", "statusCode", "createdAt", "details") VALUES ('RETENTION_TEST_91420043', 'AUTH', 'TEST', '/manual/test', '127.0.0.1', 200, NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days', '{"test":"RETENTION_TEST_91420043"}');
kw.arg: INSERT INTO "SystemLog" ("action", "logType", "method", "endpoint", "ipAddress", "statusCode", "createdAt", "details") VALUES ('${test_action}', 'AUTH', 'TEST', '/manual/test', '127.0.0.1', 200, NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days', '{"test":"${test_action}"}');
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Check If Exists In Database
kw.msg: Keyword 'DatabaseLibrary.Check If Exists In Database' is deprecated. Use new `Check Row Count` keyword with assertion engine instead. The deprecated keyword will be removed in future versions.

Executing sql:
SELECT id FROM "SystemLog" WHERE "action" = 'RETENTION_TEST_91420043';

Query returned 1 rows
Rowid
0360
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED* Use new `Check Row Count` keyword with assertion engine instead. The deprecated keyword will be removed in future versions.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Success! Data from 90 days ago is still retrievable.
kw.arg: Success! Data from 90 days ago is still retrievable.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
DELETE FROM "SystemLog" WHERE "action" = 'RETENTION_TEST_91420043';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

test.doc: จำลองการสร้างข้อมูลย้อนหลัง 90 วัน และตรวจสอบว่า Admin ยังดึงข้อมูลได้

errors.msg: Keyword 'DatabaseLibrary.Check If Exists In Database' is deprecated. Use new `Check Row Count` keyword with assertion engine instead. The deprecated keyword will be removed in future versions.
